programs.title: World's Biggest Baddest Bugs
programs.desc: Get a close-up on chilling creepy-crawlies with the emperor of entomology.

programs.title: Wild Workers
programs.desc: Nature's butchers, living on the wildest side of life, feeding on blood, bone and guts.

programs.title: Ghost Killers
programs.desc: Discover the unique traits that allow owls to attack their prey at night.

programs.title: Predator's Playbook
programs.desc: Watch predators use speed, agility, and skill to win at all costs.

programs.title: Dawn to Dusk
programs.desc: The sun rules everything on the arid Arabian Peninsula where lizards and camels have adapted.

programs.title: Siberia's Wild Year
programs.desc: Only the hardiest animals are capable of carving out a life over a wild year in Siberia.
